title: RPG skill tree
description:
RPG skill tree for pufferfish's skills
8 classes included
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/594b7d55b5005135a7deeecdec162627b7fb56f5_0.webp)
# RPG Skill Tree

This is a skill tree for the mod [Pufferfish's skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills), It also needs [pufferfish's attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributes).

## What is this?!

This is a skill tree for your perfect rpg adventure! play as a warrior, archer, rogue, hunter, berserker, healer, ranger, or barbarian! 

**BUT** there's more! Start grabbing your gear, because you can also upgrade your: mining, farming, digging, wood chopping, and more!

There are so much different things to upgrade that I can't tell them all, but you can be faster, stronger, tankier, you can claim instant loot, mine faster and so much more!
more than 35 different skills to claim, with almost 500 skills to claim!!!

## Numbers:
- 8 Classes
- 7 Trees
- 500+ skills
- 35+ different skills


## Q&A

<details>
<summary>What does "required points" mean?</summary>
It means you need to spend at least x amount of points in that tree to be able to unlock that skill. this is used in the mining tab
</details>


<details>
<summary>Can I use this in my modpack?</summary>
Yes, I would love it to see your modpacks using this mod!
</details>
